name: Cheese Drop Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, salt, and baking powder.
2. Chop in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add enough milk to form a soft dough.
4. Stir in the ground cheese.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a greased baking tin.
6. Bake at a moderate temperature of 400°F (200°C) for 10-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Note: The original recipe does not specify cooking time or temperature beyond suggesting a moderate oven setting and a general baking duration.
